svg.text: Multimodal Graph Reasoning · NSCLC Survival & Metastasis Pathway Inference
Staged architecture: frozen transformer reservoir → trainable explanation-guided prediction heads

text.tspan: If a modality is absent, the organ

svg.text: • Z = LN(Q + Attn(Q, K=T, V=T)) + FFN

text.tspan: Acts as a reservoir — no gradient

svg.text: • Maps Z → Z' across organ nodes
• Edge diffusion: p_{i→j} = σ( MLP([z'_i, z'_j, e_ij]) )
• s-context and e-context routed back into prediction trunk
L = L_os + L_rec + L_loc + λ₁L_expl_rec + λ₂L_expl_loc + λ₃L_edge_prior
Stage 12–13 · ExplanationGuidedPrimaryModel · Only trained module in the pipeline
Stages ② and ③ use fixed random weights (no backprop). They act as a high-dimensional reservoir that non-linearly mixes multimodal features.
Stage ④ is the only trained module. Cox PH loss on survival outcomes serves as the latent supervisor for the metastasis pathway explanation.
